working_on: Author ADR 0038 (expression contract for AI-authored code) plus operational surface engine/operations/code-discipline.md; extend validate.py with validate_code_gates() invoking ruff/mypy/pytest; wire gates into pre-commit; add cold-review pass to session-shutdown-sequence.md; retrofit validate.py under the new contract (per-function contract blocks, full pytest coverage of hard-fail and soft-warn paths, mypy --strict + ruff clean) so the validator binds to its own gates from this session forward; update CLAUDE.md Topical pointers. Override of STATE.md's queued S-0026 = Phase 3 SQL Schema; user-directed displacement so the code-discipline foundation lands before substantive build phases author Python at scale. Phase 3 (SQL Schema) re-queues to S-0027 or later.
outcome_summary: ADR 0038 (code expression contract for AI-authored code) plus engine/operations/code-discipline.md landed. Three discipline layers: contract-first prose (per-function docstring contracts; ADRs for module-level decisions), mechanical gates (ruff + mypy --strict + pytest + test-presence in pre-commit, all hard-fail), cold-context review pass at session shutdown. Amendment asymmetry follows ADR 0036's pattern. validate.py retrofitted under the contract: module-level + per-function contract blocks; new validate_code_gates(files) function invoking the gate stack as subprocesses; main() extended with --code-gates / --files flags; mypy --strict + ruff clean. New: engine/tools/test_validate.py with 38 pytest tests covering ValidationResult, validate_repo_structure across all 11 check categories (hard-fail and soft-warn paths), validate_code_gates across all gate paths, validate_graph stub, telemetry helpers, and main() exit-code mapping. New: engine/tools/requirements.txt declaring ruff/mypy/pytest. Pre-commit hook wired to detect staged Python under engine/ and invoke --code-gates. Session-shutdown-sequence.md gains step 3 (cold-review pass for sessions modifying tracked Python under engine/), steps 4–8 renumbered, recovery section updated. CLAUDE.md Topical pointers gains the code-discipline.md entry. Cold-review pass on this session's Python diff (validate.py + test_validate.py): both files match contract — no drift; the mechanism's first exercise lands clean. The validator binds to its own gates from this session forward — no grandfathering. Override of STATE.md's queued S-0026 (Phase 3 SQL Schema) was user-directed; Phase 3 re-queues to S-0027. ADR count post-S-0026: 38 ADRs total — 36 Accepted plus 2 Superseded, partitioned 5 engine + 33 product. validate.py: 11 checks, 0 hard-fails, 0 soft-warns. code-gates: 5 gates, 0 hard-fails. pytest: 38/38 passing.
